description: The image shows only the CrossMark publication-integrity logo—a red bookmark icon inside a blue circular border with the adjacent text label 'CrossMark'—and contains no materials-science experimental data. No micrographs, diffraction patterns, spectra, stress-strain curves, phase diagrams, or schematic illustrations of alloy microstructures are visible, so no material system, sample designation, heat-treatment condition, phase identification, or performance metric can be extracted directly from the pixels. The surrounding paper context identifies the work as a review on Fe-Mn-Al-C low-density steels covering ferritic, duplex, and austenitic alloy classes, deformation mechanisms, and processing strategies, but this specific image does not depict any of those metallurgical findings. Because the figure caption is empty and no citation sentences are provided, no direct scientific observation or quantitative trend can be attributed to this figure.
